DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $175, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Notice And Motion For Order To Compel Responses To Interrogatories Pursuant To Ccp 2030.290(B); Request For Fees And Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-11-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff The National Collection Agency, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $175, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
(EAH/612)

Mo For Order Purs To Ccp Sections 2033.280(B); 2033.280(C); And 2033.410(A)
Off Calendar Apr-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff The National Collection Agency, Inc.'s Motion For Order Deeming Requests For Admissions Admitted is denied as it seeks an order deeming requests for admissions admitted. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $262.50, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
